meta.title: Labs Cannabis — Cannabis Shop in Pattaya
meta.description: Licensed cannabis shop in Pattaya. On-site medical card in 2 minutes, walk-in friendly, 5 min from Walking Street. Russian- and English-speaking staff.
meta.ogDescription: Licensed cannabis shop in Pattaya. Walk in, get your medical card on the spot, pick your strain. 5 min from Walking Street.

hero.title: Cannabis shop in Pattaya
hero.subtitle: Fresh buds & pre-rolls — 5 min from Walking Street. Walk in, we'll help you pick.

noPrescription.title: No prescription? We've got you.
noPrescription.subtitle: Thailand requires a medical card — but don't worry, we handle everything on the spot. Just walk in.
noPrescription.step1Desc: No appointment needed. Just come to the shop any time we're open.
noPrescription.step2Desc: Quick form on your phone — takes 2 minutes. Our staff will guide you through every step.
noPrescription.step3Desc: Pick your strain, pay, and enjoy. That's it.

directions.title: Best route on foot
directions.step1: Head to Pattaya 13 Alley (Soi Hollywood) from Walking Street.
directions.step2: Stay on the alley and look for LABS DISPENSARY signage.
directions.step3: We're on your left side, around the middle of Pattaya 13 Alley.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Ask a question or check what's available — we usually reply within 5 minutes during working hours.

footer.disclaimer: Adults 20+ only. Licensed cannabis shop operating under the Thai medical cannabis framework.

about.title: Who We Are
about.guideDescription: Dmitry personally selects every strain we carry and keeps an eye on what ends up on the shelf. Speaks Russian and English fluently. First time? He'll walk you through everything — what to expect, what to pick, how much to start with. No pressure, just honest advice.
about.teamDescription: We speak Russian, English, and Thai. Happy to help with strain selection and medical card — no pressure, no rush.
about.guidePhotoAlt: Dmitry — cannabis guide at Labs Cannabis

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1: Do I need a prescription or medical card?
faq.a1: Thailand requires a medical card for cannabis purchases. We help you get one on the spot — it's a quick digital form on your phone, takes about 2 minutes. Our staff walks you through every step.
faq.a2: Yes. Tourists can legally purchase medical cannabis in Thailand with a medical card, which we help you obtain right here at the shop.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: Cash (Thai Baht) and QR bank transfer. No credit cards at this time.
faq.q4: Can I smoke here or is it takeaway only?
faq.a4: Takeaway only. We sell product for personal use — there's no smoking area on site.
faq.q5: How do I find you from Walking Street?
faq.a5: 5-minute walk. Head into Soi Hollywood (Pattaya 13 Alley), look for LABS signage on the left side. We're around the middle of the lane.
faq.a6: We're open every day, no appointment needed. Check the hours in the header — they update in real time.
faq.q7: I've never tried cannabis. Can your staff help me choose?
faq.a7: Absolutely. Tell us what you're looking for — relaxation, energy, better sleep — and we'll recommend a strain and amount. No pressure, take your time.
